title: Down Payment Calculator - Home Purchase Planning
description: Free down payment calculator. Calculate how much you need for a home down payment and see how it affects your monthly mortgage payment.
keywords: down payment calculator, home down payment, house down payment, mortgage down payment, how much down payment
intro: Calculate your home down payment amount and see how different percentages affect your mortgage. Plan your savings for homeownership.

faq.q: How much down payment do I need?
faq.a: Conventional loans typically require 5-20%. FHA loans require 3.5%. Putting 20% down avoids PMI (Private Mortgage Insurance).
Private Mortgage Insurance is required when your down payment is less than 20%. It typically costs 0.5-1% of the loan amount annually.

faq.q: Is a bigger down payment always better?
faq.a: A larger down payment means lower monthly payments and no PMI, but keeping an emergency fund is also important. Balance both goals.
